Fist of Lightning  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
Skill: Hand to Hand Atk Delay: 18
DMG: 15 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +8 DEX: +8 AGI: +8
SV MAGIC: +10
Haste: +41%
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: MNK BST
Race: HUM BAR ELF TRL OGR IKS VAH FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Fist of Lightning
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
Skill: Hand to Hand Atk Delay: 18
DMG: 15 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +8 DEX: +8 AGI: +8
SV MAGIC: +10
Haste: +41%
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: MNK BST
Race: HUM BAR ELF TRL OGR IKS VAH FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:Martial
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Haro Doomwolf
Lucy Entry By:Agamenoar
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-09-11 05:13:52
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Temple of Veeshan
NPC Name
Eashen of the Sky


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Temple of Veeshan


Uploaded January 31st, 2022 by halfridge
Send a correction
Post Comment
Value in the post-pop world
QuoteReply
# Apr 05 2004 at 12:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591801435431
Scholar
105 posts
a 15/18 1hander is still a GREAT weapon for anyone in a pre-elemental guild and considering how easy it is to get with 3 - 4 groups of decently well-equipped organized people, it's amazing that more people don't get this. With a nice lifetap proc in the type 4 slot it makes quite a nice weapon. Too bad it's offhand only, but I guess you can't have everything.

See my post under Eashen for a strat on fighting him.

Full Date
QuoteReply
# May 05 2003 at 4:45 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592249030845
33 posts
Ignore other post
This Item drops in NToV
NToV is the north wing of the temple of veeshan the hardest Area. All mobs there are KoS to you exept for chicken drakes verry low lvl that are on CoV Faction.
Drops off of Eashen of the Sky The 2nd Named mob in NToV 2nd Easyst he is a large blue drake.
To kill him you will need 3 Groups + to be safe.

#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 13 2003 at 7:36 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I'm sorry I am not trying to belittle anyone I just find it funny that in the last 30 posts I have looked at someone is always asking if the item in question is also droped in chardok... Apparently Chardok really rocks for loot, looks like I need to be camping there =)
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 16 2002 at 8:53 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Where the hell did you think that a 15/18 w/ haste + stats dropped in chardok. Chardok is a noob zone.
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 23 2002 at 3:41 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i have information that says this wep drops in chardok as well could some one pls tell me if my info is correct or not so i can stop looking in the wrong place :)

#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 06 2002 at 7:01 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) My friend got this awhile back, lucky dog, I really envy him now :P Gratz Iskariot you lucky ****
epics
QuoteReply
# Oct 19 2001 at 5:06 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751631414
8 posts
Monk epics when equipped convert your hands at level 60 from 14/26 to 9/16. 9/16 will be the ratio of any level or race monk equipped with them. This item is incredible ... the most sought after item I have come across. Pair this with a gharns or primal velium fistwrap .. toss your avatar proc and you are a machine. Great to see them upgrading monks damage a bit to put us back where we were pre kunark .. masters of toe to toe damage .. and unchallenged.
▲ Page top
RE: epics
QuoteReply
# Mar 23 2003 at 10:49 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247140349
112 posts
LOL...
He he..."masters of Toe to toe and Unchallenged"

Things sure have changed since this posting over a year ago....
Ive YET to meet one of these so called Uber Monks that put out more DPS than just your "average" Beastlord.....
Im not Uber in any stretch of the imagination just average gear, and as long as i dont have aggro (so im not getting the mob reposte/dodge etc)and mob isnt highly resistant, i do a solid 140 DPS at lvl 62....
Ive yet to meet a single Monk in 3 years that does a solid 140 DPS....though im sure he exist somewhere...maybe 2-5 Uber Monks per server might be able to outdamage your "average" Beastlord...

Your Uber Beastlord...will smoke any Monk....

Level 65 Beast with Uber gear raid buffed your looking at close to 8KHP, PLUS another 6K+HPs for pet, and pet can be CH by Beast...
Uber 65 Beast can 65% Slow Mob....Debuff it, DOT it, DD it, stand "Toe to Toe" to Mob longer than Monk back up let pet take over hit PAragon of Spirits and step right back in to deal more Dam...

Monks are more like maybe 4th in line in the DPS dept...
Rogue>Beast/Ranger>Monk......
Im not so sure Rangers outdamage a well equiped Beast either...be close...bout tied...

and a Fine H2H weapon such as this if there is a Beastlord there should be given first crack at it

H2H weaponary is the best option for a Beast by far...its the ONLY weapon skill a Beast Maxes out at....Monk on the other hand maxes at several weapon skills....
To give this to the Monk with a Beast in group, would be on par with handing one of the best Piercers in the game to a Warrior with a Rogue in group...(Rogue is the ONLY other class in game BTW that has only ONE weapon skill that maxes).
▲ Page top
RE: epics
QuoteReply
# Aug 26 2010 at 8:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592783176844
2 posts
Dood,.... uber beastlord eh?..... im lvl 71 monk, and your 62 with a dps of 140,... LMAO, i could beat your *** in a dual without using my melee attack button,.... flying kick and riposte alone i would smoke your boots. I dont know my DPS but on any given combat round i can clearly see a window of at least 900 to 1400 dps. and my gear sucks,.... trust me man your little tiger wouldn't have a prayer if we fought.

# Jun 02 2004 at 8:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591808271681
18 posts
i hate to say this but you are right in that aspect BL's over power almost any class in the game, BUT if you take away the pet a BL is just as usefull as a shammy =p and as for BL's getting 1st crack at it......dood Munks were around way before BL's.....dueal a Monk with out your pet and eat your words =)

Edited, Wed Jun 2 09:01:36 2004
▲ Page top
RE: epics
QuoteReply
# May 29 2004 at 12:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1679876276440
5 posts
Hate to tell you catpurr, But on alot of raids you can't use pets for agro, and because of push reasons. Take your pet away and any decently equiped monk will blow your bstlord out of the water in DPS. True you get spells, paragone, crack etc. But you sacrifice DPS. You may have more hitpoints as well, we simply get hit alot less. our classes where not meant to be compared in the same fashion. To say this is a pure Bst weapon is a judgement of your greed and character. If it was made for a bstlord to really have it would give your *** mana.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 23 2003 at 10:58 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You are a complete moron. Beastlords are f-ing hybrids of monks and shaman and DPS Monks always >>>>>>> Beastlord with equal equipment. You forget dumbass Monks get triple attack just about the time Beastlords start thinking about double attack. Sure an uber Beastlord will probably out damage a monk with 2 CoTs.
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 12 2003 at 1:54 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Actually, speaking of morons, perhaps you ought to get yourself a parser before you shoot off your mouth. I think you'll find that higher level Beastlords, with proper AAs and comparable gear, will just about do equal damage to a monk of same level. Then you must factor in the extra 60+ DPS from that nasty pet (Straight melee damage, not counting procs).
RE: epics
QuoteReply
# Oct 31 2003 at 12:41 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591792762974
74 posts
actually iv yet to ever meet a Monk i dont usually outdamge also, even way back when i was like lvl 9 all the way to lvl 65 with 230AAs.

Buts its all kind of a pointless arguement anywho,

most of the time neither Monk nor Beast are doing "just" DPS anyway, Monks are Pulling etc, Beast are Casting Fero/Sav, healing, MGB Paragon, preslowing all mezzed Mobs to keep aggro off the chanters in case mez breaks, etc etc, so neither class is really the ones doing the lions share of damage on raids and such.

Thats the Wizards/rangers/rogues, even mages/druids.

Now in a single group with say a Bard pulling and say a SK tanking, yeah ill smoke a Monk anyday in overall DPS, so NO a Monk is NOT always >> than Beast in DPS, depends on alot of things, and how resistant the Mob is to cold etc, but even without my spells Im bout tied with most Monks damage wise just me and pet Melee only.

But DPS wise none of us Melees or Hybrids can touch pure casters anyway.
Hell a buck nekked 65 wiz on a CR can still pump out 300DPS in a pinch.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Oct 14 2001 at 10:00 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) It's in the secondary slot because when u get ur epic it makes ur HAND TO HAND skill like a weap 9/10 I believe. So if u did get these...and u already had ur epic...then theyed be the weap with more DLY.
hmm

# Oct 13 2001 at 12:47 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591749817370
Scholar
397 posts
pretty soon they'll make weaps like 'Foot NYoAss' with 40% haste. Oh wait, that would be grey suede boots... damn..

Dude I thought I was cool when my monk won a siblisian berserker cloak, but they keep puttin more and more eff: haste items in the game... Now every lvl 60 monk in a large guild laughs at the plane of sky belt for being crappy.

remember when sash was like godlike? then you realized you had to kill eye of veeshan till you got the quest drop? kinda put a damper on things... I mean verant didn't wanna trivialize cloak of flames before, but they kinda are now.

This weap does own tho... big grats to Darkwind.

#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 12 2001 at 9:23 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) just make hand wraps for all. No need to have any smithing skill to make weapons they lose both dam and delay doing so. 110 posts
Needless to say, the new monk "handwrap" weapons kick the crap out of their epic (good, not like they work for it anyway ;). These are definitely a plus. Monks get dibs on the Primal Wraps in Sleepers, and the other 1HB's can go to the other dual wielders.

RE: Wowzers
QuoteReply
# May 08 2002 at 3:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772738273
77 posts
this isn't an upgrade to the monk epic, this is something to use in tandem with your epic - epic is spell haste, this is item haste (enc's aug line)
▲ Page top
RE: Wowzers
QuoteReply
# Nov 22 2001 at 8:26 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762861307
View User Forum
26 posts
Actually, monks don't get dibs on handwraps in Sleeper's Tomb. The handwraps are not a drop, you see. The way you get them is turning in a primal/priceless battle hammer to the dwarf standing outside the zone-in, and he gives you a handwrap.

That means that monks still are in the competition for the 1HB in there - those are the only way to get the handwraps.
▲ Page top
RE: Wowzers
QuoteReply
# Nov 02 2001 at 2:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361254562
View User Forum
119 posts
Of course they get dibs on the primal hand wraps, they are monk only.
▲ Page top
RE: Wowzers
QuoteReply
# Dec 12 2001 at 2:43 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591762861307
View User Forum
26 posts
Heh...you obviously missed my point.

He said that monks get dibs on this drop in ST. My point is that monks cannot get "dibs" on this, as this is not a dropped weapon, period.

This is a weapon obtained by turning in a Primal Battlehammer to an NPC outside the zone.

Saying that monks get "dibs" on this is like saying that paladins get "dibs" on the Fiery Avenger....

__DEL__1592251059970

heres a novel idea(in all seriousness) y dont u get the primal, and this so u can get rid of those haste pieces for better stats and/or AC and u will still kik ***. to bad it so rare no1s gonna get both soon :(
▲ Page top
RE: Secondary only?
QuoteReply
# Jun 12 2003 at 2:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250248405
56 posts
Obviously, both would be ideal, but to the guy who would take primal over this "any day" I gotta wonder what yer smokin... Primal, while having nice stats and, of course, avatar, doesn't even come close to the DPS of this weapon. Primal weapons, or "ancient prismatic" as they are called now, are strictly switch-out weapons in this day and age. You use it until it procs, then swap out a real weapon for 5.5 minutes, then use it until it procs again. Rinse and repeat. I don't know anyone who owns primal that uses it all the time.
▲ Page top
